exactResidualBugGone.previousBlockedText: Music is about to drop. If the next 5 seconds hit hard, I'm sharing this.

chunk13to16ContinuityRead.assessment: Chunks 13-16 read like one lived trailer watch with ongoing escalation and payoff-seeking, not four cold-open micro-clips.

chunks.13: Every time I think I know what this game is, they throw something even weirder at me. I'm definitely watching to the end.
chunks.14: If the jungle scene hits as hard as the city one, I'm locked in.
chunks.15: If they keep switching locations this fast, I need to see where we go next.
chunks.16: Where are we going next? I need to see the payoff.

examples.text: Okay, you bought yourself a few more seconds, but don't get comfy.
